basic_details.job_title: NSUT Teaching and Non Teaching Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 61 Assistant Professor, MO and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Netaji Subhas University of Technology (NSUT), a State University under Act 06 of 2018, Govt. of NCT of Delhi, Azad Hind Fauj Marg, Sector-3, Dwarka, New Delhi – 110078 has released official advertisements for Assistant Professor, Associate Professor, and Group 'A' Non-Teaching Officer positions across various departments.

important_dates.interview_date: Will be notified on the University website in due course

application_fee.details: Fee is non-refundable. SC/ST/PwBD candidates applying under General Category will pay as per SC/ST/PwBD slab. Payment must be made through the online application portal.

age_limit.details: Age Relaxation: Available for SC/ST/OBC/EWS/PwBD candidates as per DoPT guidelines issued by the Government of India. | Campus Posting: Selected candidates may be posted or transferred to any NSUT campus — Main Campus (Dwarka), East Campus (Geeta Colony), or West Campus (Jaffarpur, Najafgarh).

qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill the minimum qualifications and experience specified for each post: | Assistant Professor – Biological Sciences & Engineering / Bio-Technology: B.E./B.Tech./B.S. and M.E./M.Tech./M.S. or Integrated M.Tech. in relevant branch with First Class or equivalent in any one of the degrees. Assistant Professor – Physics / Chemistry / Mathematics: Master's degree with 55% marks in the concerned/relevant subject from a recognized Indian or foreign university, plus cleared UGC/CSIR NET or SLET/SET; OR Ph.D. awarded as per UGC Regulations 2009/2016 (exempted from NET); OR Ph.D. from a foreign university ranked in the top 500 by QS, THE, or ARWU. Assistant Professor – Design: Bachelor's Degree or minimum 4-year Diploma AND Master's Degree or equivalent PG Diploma (First Class in both) in Engineering/Design or relevant branch with minimum 2 years of professional design experience after Master's; OR Integrated Master's Degree (First Class) with 3 years of professional design experience. Ph.D. in Design or allied field is desirable. Assistant Professor – Geo-Informatics: B.E./B.Tech./B.S. in relevant discipline AND M.E./M.Tech./M.S. or Integrated M.Tech. in relevant specialization, with First Class or equivalent in either Bachelor's or Master's degree. Ph.D. in relevant discipline is desirable. Associate Professor – Biological Sciences & Engineering / Bio-Technology: Ph.D. in relevant field with First Class at Bachelor's or Master's level + minimum 6 research publications in SCI/SCIE/SCOPUS + minimum 8 years of teaching/research/industry experience (at least 2 years post-Ph.D.). Associate Professor – Physics / Chemistry / Mathematics: Ph.D. in concerned/allied discipline + Master's degree with at least 55% marks + minimum 8 years of teaching/research experience + minimum 7 peer-reviewed publications + total research score of 75 as per UGC 2018 norms. Associate Professor – Design: Ph.D. in relevant field + Bachelor's/Master's Degree or equivalent PG Diploma (First Class or equivalent) in Engineering/Design + minimum 6 research publications in SCI/SCIE/SSCI/AHCI journals + minimum 8 years of professional design experience (at least 2 years post-Ph.D.). Associate Professor – Geo-Informatics: Ph.D. in relevant discipline + Master's and Bachelor's Degree in relevant discipline with First Class or equivalent + minimum 8 years of teaching/research/industry experience (at least 2 years post-Ph.D.) with minimum 6 SCI research publications. | Campus Director (Age: up to 60 years): Ph.D. degree with First Class at Bachelor's or Master's level in Engineering & Technology + minimum 2 Ph.D. scholars guided (degree awarded) as supervisor/co-supervisor + minimum 10 research publications in SCI/SCIE/SSCI journals + total 15 years of teaching/research/industry experience in regular scale, of which at least 5 years must be at the level of Professor. Training & Placement Officer (Age: up to 50 years): MBA/PGDM (2-year course) + UG degree in Engineering/Management/Sciences/Commerce + total 12 years of experience, of which at least 6 years in Training & Placement at Level 10 and above (7th CPC) or equivalent. UG degree in Engineering is desirable. Medical Officer (Age: up to 35 years): Recognized MBBS qualification as per the Indian Medical Council Act, 1956 + completion of compulsory rotating internship. Candidates who have not yet completed internship may apply, provided they complete it before appointment.

salary_details.details: Essential administrative details regarding all vacancy packages are as follows: | *The above vacancies include backlog vacancies.

how_to_apply: Eligible candidates must complete both online and offline (hard copy) registration as follows:
Visit the official NSUT website: http://www.nsut.ac.in and fill the online application form in CAPITAL LETTERS.
Submit separate online applications and fees for each post applied for.
Ensure a valid email ID is provided that will remain active throughout the recruitment process.
